2605.09395.title: Empowering VLMs for Few-Shot Multimodal Time Series Classification via Tailored Agentic Reasoning
2605.09395.paper_summary: In this paper, we propose the first VL$\underline{\textbf{M}}$ $\underline{\textbf{a}}$gentic $\underline{\textbf{r}}$easoning framework for few-$\underline{\textbf{s}}$hot multimodal $\underline{\textbf{T}}$ime $\underline{\textbf{S}}$eries $\underline{\textbf{C}}$lassification ($\textbf{MarsTSC}$), which introduces a self-evolving knowledge bank as a dynamic context iteratively refined via reflective agentic reasoning. The framework comprises three collaborative roles: i) Generator conducts reliable classification via reasoning; ii) Reflector diagnoses the root causes of reasoning errors to yield discriminative insights targeting the temporal features overlooked by Generator; iii) Modifier applies verified updates to the knowledge bank to prevent context collapse. We further introduce a test-time update strategy to enable cautious, continuous knowledge bank refinement to mitigate few-shot bias and distribution shift. Extensive experiments across 12 mainstream time series benchmarks demonstrate that $\textbf{MarsTSC}$ delivers substantial and consistent performance gains across 6 VLM backbones, outperforming both classical and foundation model-based time series baselines under few-shot conditions, while producing interpretable rationales that ground each classification decision in human-readable feature evidence.
2605.09395.paper_summary_zh: 在本文中，我們提出了首個 VL$\underline{\textbf{M}}$ $\underline{\textbf{a}}$gentic $\underline{\textbf{r}}$easoning 框架，用於少量樣本的多模態時間序列分類（$\textbf{MarsTSC}$），該框架引入了一個自我演化的知識庫，作為一個動態上下文，通過反思性代理推理進行迭代精煉。該框架包含三個協作角色：i) 生成器通過推理進行可靠的分類；ii) 反射器診斷推理錯誤的根本原因，以產生針對生成器所忽略的時間特徵的區別性見解；iii) 修改器對知識庫應用經過驗證的更新，以防止上下文崩潰。我們進一步引入了一種測試時更新策略，以實現謹慎的、持續的知識庫精煉，以減輕少樣本偏差和分佈轉移。對 12 個主流時間序列基準的廣泛實驗表明，$\textbf{MarsTSC}$ 在 6 個 VLM 主幹上提供了顯著且一致的性能增益，超越了在少樣本條件下的經典和基於基礎模型的時間序列基準，同時產生可解釋的推理，將每個分類決策基於人類可讀的特徵證據。
2605.09395.author: Lin Li et.al.
2605.09395.authors: Lin Li, Jiawei Huang, Qihao Quan, Dan Li, Boxin Li, Xiao Zhang, Erli Meng, Wenjie Feng, Jian Lou, See-Kiong Ng
